Petition To Determine Distribution Rights.
Off Calendar Jun-30-2008 Granted Per Written Order

Off Calendar Mar-10-2008 Continued To Apr-14-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Distribution Rights.
Off Calendar Feb-11-2008 Continued To Mar-10-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Weinkauff for the Petitioner.

The Court stated that Harry Klavin, the executor of the estate was deceased and that the Court did not know the date of death. In addition, the Court stated that Mr. Klavin was a taker on the Claston will and the trustee for the Jewish Charities. The matter was continued to March 10, 2008 for the filing of the amended petition to determine distribution rights. Mr. Weinkauff is to give notice to the Attorney General.

Judge Pro Tem: Sue Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Hill.
